elements.title: Otter Meeting Agent - AI Notetaker, Transcription, Insights
elements.hero_subheadline: Otter is the AI Notetaker that builds your knowledge base and powers your workflow with transcription, automated summaries, AI Chat, and more.
h2s: Like having your own executive assistant
